frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task timing starts, good initial instrument positioning

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper visualization of suture loading process

Suture being passed through Penrose drain at marked locations
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good needle control and placement technique

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper setup for surgeon's knot initiation

frame_analyses.description: Completing double throw of surgeon's knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good execution of surgeon's knot double throw

frame_analyses.description: Beginning second throw with hand switching

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good knot security and tightening technique

frame_analyses.description: Cutting both suture ends with scissors
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper cutting technique with appropriate tail length

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw executed well
Good hand switching and single throw execution
Final throw properly executed with hand switch

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit properly closed with no visible gaps

technique_summary: Excellent technique demonstrated with proper surgeon's knot, correct hand switching between throws, and good suture placement. The trainee shows consistent improvement from previous attempts.
improvement_suggestions: Consider slightly more precise suture placement at the marks
Continue practicing to maintain this high level of performance
